name: Jalapeno Jelly II
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peppers, vinegar, and sugar in a large pot.
2. Cook the mixture over medium heat for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the liquid pectin and continue cooking for an additional minute.
4. Add green food coloring to achieve desired color.
5. Allow the jelly to cool for 15 minutes before transferring it into jars.
6. Store the jars in a cool, dry place until ready to use.
Makes 6 half-pint jars. (Peppers may be strained out if desired.)
